channel.title: Latest from Tom's Guide
channel.description: All the latest content from the Tom's Guide team

item.title: How to watch 'The Heartbreak Kid: Becoming Shawn Michaels' online from anywhere — stream WWE documentary now
item.description: Shawn Michaels is the latest subject in Peacock's "Becoming" documentary series, with a 96-minute film that tracks his rise. Here's how to watch 'The Heartbreak Kid: Becoming Shawn Michaels' online from anywhere now.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Preece

media:content.media:description: The Heartbreak Kid Becoming Shawn Michaels
media:content.media:text: The Heartbreak Kid Becoming Shawn Michaels
media:content.media:title: The Heartbreak Kid Becoming Shawn Michaels

item.title: How to watch Bayern Munich vs Real Madrid: FREE live streams, preview for Champions League 2025/26 quarter-final
item.description: All the ways to watch Bayern Munich vs Real Madrid live streams for free, with Kane and Bellingham set to star in the Champions League 2025/26 quarter-final.
item.dc:creator: Aatif Sulleyman

media:content.media:credit: Alberto Gardin/Eurasia Sport Images via Getty Images
media:content.media:description: England teammates Jude Bellingham and Harry Kane battling for the ball during a Bayern Munich vs Real Madrid game
media:content.media:text: England teammates Jude Bellingham and Harry Kane battling for the ball during a Bayern Munich vs Real Madrid game
media:content.media:title: England teammates Jude Bellingham and Harry Kane battling for the ball during a Bayern Munich vs Real Madrid game

item.title: Future Games Show returns this summer with more than 50 games: here's how to watch
item.description: Future Games Show returns for its Summer Showcase with more than 50 trailers, demos and deep dives into upcoming games.
item.author: scott.younker@futurenet.com (Scott Younker)
item.dc:creator: Scott Younker

media:content.media:description: Future Games Show, FGS Live, PC Gaming Show

item.title: Starbucks is now in the ChatGPT app store — here’s how to order drinks to match your mood and outfit
item.description: Starbucks launched a beta app inside ChatGPT that lets you use prompts to come up with drinks that connect to your current mood, pictures of your outfits and more.
item.dc:creator: Elton Jones

media:content.media:description: Three Starbucks frappuccinos
media:content.media:text: Three Starbucks frappuccinos
media:content.media:title: Three Starbucks frappuccinos

item.title: Shopping for a TV has never been easier — meet the new Tom’s Guide Product Finder
item.description: Alongside the redesigned website, we’re also launching a new tool to help make TV shopping easier than ever before.
item.author: Nick.Pino@futurenet.com (Nick Pino)
item.dc:creator: Nick Pino

media:content.media:description: The new Tom's Guide Product Finder tool

media:content.media:title: The new Tom's Guide Product Finder tool

item.title: How to watch 'One Day in My Body' online from anywhere — stream TLC's intimate new medical docuseries
item.description: Here's how to watch 'One Day in My Body' as it follows people living with some of the world's rarest medical conditions in a self-shot TLC series that feels far more personal than the usual medical reality format.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Preece

media:content.media:description: One Day in My Body
media:content.media:text: One Day in My Body
media:content.media:title: One Day in My Body

item.title: NordVPN responds to its 'dumpster fire' Mac VPN update
item.description: NordVPN's desktop users have reported connection issues, bugs, and lagging after installing its new update. These are serious problems, but NordVPN has promised a fix.
item.dc:creator: George Phillips

media:content.media:description: NordVPN open on MacBook displaying new UI and dashboard
media:content.media:text: NordVPN open on MacBook displaying new UI and dashboard
media:content.media:title: NordVPN open on MacBook displaying new UI and dashboard

item.title: These best-selling Brooks running shoes just dropped to $119 at Amazon — and they come in tons of colors
item.description: Learn why shoppers love the Brooks Ghost 17 running shoes — and score an epic saving.
item.author: millie.daviswilliams@futurenet.com (Millie Davis-Williams)
item.dc:creator: Millie Davis-Williams

media:content.media:description: Brooks running shoes
media:content.media:text: Brooks running shoes
media:content.media:title: Brooks running shoes

item.title: How to watch 'Law & Order Toronto' season 3 online from anywhere
item.description: Here's how to watch "Law & Order Toronto" season 3 online and from anywhere in the world, outside of Canada. Streaming info and VPN options for those traveling in the USA.
item.dc:creator: Tom Bailey

media:content.media:description: Law & Order Toronto' season 3
media:content.media:text: Law & Order Toronto' season 3
media:content.media:title: Law & Order Toronto' season 3

item.title: Saatva's best five-star luxury hotel mattress is back on sale, but should you wait to buy the Classic in the Memorial Day sales?
item.description: I was shocked by how luxurious the Saatva Classic was in person, and now this premium mattress is $300 off for all sizes — here's who should buy it now (and who should wait.)
item.dc:creator: Frances Daniels

media:content.media:description: Two reviewers check out the Saatva Classic mattress. In the bottom left-hand foreground, there is a deals badge that says "PRICE DROP".

item.title: I've spent two years testing 300 cameras, earbuds, drones, keyboards and more — here are my favorites from each category
item.description: As a reviews writer, I've tested many tech products, including but not limited to cameras, keyboards, boots, and more. Here are the ones I've loved the most.
item.author: nikita.achanta@futurenet.com (Nikita Achanta)
item.dc:creator: Nikita Achanta

media:content.media:description: Keen Zionic NXT Mid Waterproof boots and a Fujifilm X-T50 mirrorless camera

item.title: How to watch 'NOVA: Return to the Moon' online for free — from anywhere on planet Earth
item.description: Learn more about the incredible voyage of the Artemis II NASA mission with "NOVA: Return to the Moon" — Here's how to watch the new documentary online and for free
item.dc:creator: Jakob Barnes

media:content.media:description: A shot of the moon and Earth from the new PBS documentary NOVA: Return to the Moon.

media:content.media:title: A shot of the moon and Earth from the new PBS documentary NOVA: Return to the Moon.

item.title: 3 movies like 'Beast' to watch next
item.description: If you dug Idris Elba's 'Beast', you'll be in for a great time with these flicks
item.dc:creator: Brittany Vincent

media:content.media:description: (L to R) Iyana Halley as Meredith, Idris Elba as Dr. Nate Daniels and Leah Sava Jeffries as Norah in a poster for Beast.

item.title: Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream gave me the island life Animal Crossing couldn’t — and a reason to play my Switch 2 every day
item.description: Tomodachi Life is a far call from Animal Crossing or The Sims, but its customizable nature and sheer wackiness have completely won me over.
item.author: anthony.spadafora@futurenet.com (Anthony Spadafora)
item.dc:creator: Anthony Spadafora

media:content.media:description: A person playing Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream on the Nintendo Switch 2 in handheld mode
media:content.media:text: A person playing Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream on the Nintendo Switch 2 in handheld mode
media:content.media:title: A person playing Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream on the Nintendo Switch 2 in handheld mode

item.title: Heatwaves are coming but you can sleep cool with up to 50% off Brooklinen's bedding sale
item.description: There's up to 50% off in Brooklinen's massive anniversary sale, including discounts on best-selling cooling bedding to prepare you for hotter weather.
item.author: ruth.jones@futurenet.com (Ruth Jones)
item.dc:creator: Ruth Jones

item.title: Exclusive: Viture Co-founders are planning ‘invisible’ AI glasses to rival Meta
item.description: Can Viture beat Meta at its own game? We talk to the co-founders about "invisible" AI wearables, retail expansion into Best Buy, and the "Beast" becoming a gaming monitor killer.

item.title: Exclusive Apple Interview: Joz and Ternus on MacBook Neo revolution, what’s next for AI and the 'inevitability' of smart glasses
item.description: We interview Apple’s Steve ‘Joz’ Joswiak and John Ternus about the possibility of Apple glasses, how the MacBook Neo came to be and Apple’s unique perspective on AI’s evolution.

item.title: Samsung's new Micro RGB TV is finally here for $3,200 — but I'd rather buy this OLED instead
item.description: Samsung has officially launched its first Micro RGB TVs, the Samsung R95H and the R85H. The R95H starts at $3,199, and after having spent some time with it, I'd rather buy Samsung's flagship OLED TV in 2026, the S95H.
item.author: michael.desjardin@futurenet.com (Michael Desjardin)
item.dc:creator: Michael Desjardin

media:content.media:description: The Samsung R95H in a gray-colored living room displaying the Milky Way over sand dunes in the desert

item.title: I just tested Alienware’s new $349 gaming monitor — and it’s too good to be true
item.description: The Alienware AW2726DM might only be $349, but it packs all the features you'd need for an awesome gaming experience. Here are my initial thoughts.

item.title: Snap CEO dunks on Ray-Ban Metas and teases Snap Specs as his 'alien vision' for the future of computing — sounds weird, but I’m on board
item.description: Snap CEO Evan Spiegel reveals his "alien vision" for Snap Specs, calling smartphones a "biological disaster" and slamming Meta’s "camouflage" brand strategy. Discover why AR is the "rescue mission" for our screen-addicted society.

item.title: 3 key Apple Watch settings I’m using to get more sleep and hit the longevity boosting 7:1 Sleep Rule
item.description: I sleep around 6 hours a night, but I'm using my Apple Watch to follow the 7:1 sleep rule. Here's how this user-friendly gadget is helping me sleep longer and stick to the same bedtime 5 nights a week...
item.dc:creator: Frances Daniels

media:content.media:description: A split screen with an image of the Apple Watch Ultra on a woman's wrist in a bedroom setting, and an image of an iPhone 15 displaying her sleep score.

media:content.media:title: A split screen with an image of the Apple Watch Ultra on a woman's wrist in a bedroom setting, and an image of an iPhone 15 displaying her sleep score.

item.title: I tested the TCL QM9K Mini-LED TV and it’s incredibly bright — but not the best value
item.description: The TCL QM9K pulls out all the stops with a 144Hz native refresh rate, a peak brightness that’s over 6,000 nits and too many dimming zones to count — but can it hold strong against the incoming class of RGB Mini-LEDs?
item.author: Nick.Pino@futurenet.com (Nick Pino)
item.dc:creator: Nick Pino

item.title: 5 things you should stop right now if you want your AC to survive a heatwave
item.description: Stop ruining your AC: 5 common mistakes that are killing you AC's efficiency in the heat.
item.author: camilla.sharman@futurenet.com (Camilla Sharman)
item.dc:creator: Camilla Sharman
